_comment: Synthetic, committed golden set for the CI eval gate (tests/unit/eval-harness.test.mjs) and for running `npm run eval` without the gitignored real golden-set.json. The `retrieved` arrays here encode a known-good retriever so the gate has a stable floor; replace with real captured retrievals (via eval/seed.mjs) to measure the live system. Paths are illustrative, not real client code.

cases.query: whatsapp agency duplicate message two links
export button on dashboard does nothing
allow uploading passport photo from gallery not only camera
agency quote token generated twice different iat
